title: Mana Jade
description: Adds Jade 🔍 support for mana-related information in Botania.
body:
### Adds Jade 🔍 support for mana-related information in Botania.
You now have easy access to the following details: 
- Mana Pool Storage
- Generating Flower Storage
- Functional Flower Storage
- Mana Spreader Storage
- Mana Pool Catalyst
- Runic Altar Recipe Progress
- Terra Plate Recipe Progress
- Pure Daisy Recipe Progress
- Mana Star Mana Change Rate
- Hydroangeas Info
- Endoflame Info
- Thermalily Info
- RosaArcana Info
- Munchdew Info
- Mana Spreader Burst Info (related information support Lens. ):
  - Burst Starting Mana
  - Burst Velocity
  - Burst Ticks Before Mana Loss
  - Burst Mana Loss Per Tick

All information is configurable!
